description: Arnold Lee discusses the challenges and lessons learned in building a crypto payments company on Solana, focusing on cross-border payments and the obstacles faced with banks and regulators.
topic_summary: Arnold Lee, co-founder of Sphere, shares insights on the complexities of crypto payments, the importance of compliance, and introduces Spheranet as a solution for fintechs to connect with banks and regulators [t=5:60-382:85].
